notes: The TSW-1070 is a 10.1 in. wall-mount touch screen controller. It receives all operating power via PoE+ over the single RJ-45 port — there is no separate power inlet (no IEC, DC barrel, or other power connector). No rack-mount form factor. The device also supports Wi-Fi connectivity but has no additional wired I/O ports beyond the RJ-45 and two USB-A host ports.

ports.name: LAN PoE
ports.note: 8-pin RJ-45 female; 100BASE-TX Ethernet; IEEE 802.3at Type 2 PoE+ PD (receives power, 15–30 W depending on configuration); green and yellow status LEDs

ports.name: USB 1
ports.note: USB 2.0 host port; for optional room scheduling accessories (light bar, RFID card reader)

ports.name: USB 2
ports.note: USB 2.0 host port; for optional room scheduling accessories; USB ports require PoE+ (802.3at Type 2) PSE to function
